title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their companies are adopting AI coding tools at scale. They cover workflow changes, productivity measurement, and practical advice for other engineering leaders making this transition, including specific productivity metrics and structural approaches like alpha teams and small pods.
